name: Bulldocks: Daily Sales Briefing (8 AM)
description: Daily 8 AM Slack report with sales metrics, trends, and action items
notes:
SETUP STEPS:
1. Create SQLite database + tables:
   CREATE TABLE daily_metrics (date TEXT, orders INT, revenue REAL, reviews INT, avg_rating REAL);
2. Configure Slack OAuth token
3. Configure Etsy-MCP endpoint
4. Set timezone to Europe/Berlin (8 AM CET)
5. Test manually first
6. Enable workflow

TIPS:
- Use SQLite for trend data (vs yesterday, last week)
- Customize blocks layout for your needs
- Add error handling (email if fetch fails)
